  "findings": [
    "Neutrals and equipment grounding conductors are mixed/bonded together in a subpanel, violating the requirement to keep them isolated past the service disconnecting means."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate the neutral bar from the panel enclosure by removing the main bonding jumper or green screw.",
    "Install an auxiliary grounding bar bonded directly to the enclosure.",
    "Separate all equipment grounding conductors from the neutral conductors, landing them on their respective isolated bars."
  ],
  "rationale": "Mixing neutrals and grounds in a subpanel creates parallel paths for normal neutral current to flow over the grounding system (metal conduits, enclosures, and piping), presenting a severe shock and fire hazard. The neutral must remain isolated from ground downstream of the main service panel.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.142",
    "NEC 408.40",
    "NEC 200.4"
  ]
}
